results.description: THE PROJECT WORK IS TO PROVIDE ALL PERSONNEL, EQUIPMENT, SUPPLIES, FACILITIES, TRANSPORTATION, TOOLS, MATERIALS, SUPERVISION, AND OTHER ITEMS AND NON-PERSONAL SERVICES NECESSARY TO PERFORM TUG KENOSHA DRYDOCKING AND REPAIR AS DEFINED IN THE PWS.
